creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

pf as in HEAD or stable/8 has not yet been virtulaized and 
this is an unsupported configuration.  See various discussions 
on the virtualization list onwhere to find a work in progress. 
Archives can be found here: 
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-virtualization/ .
